order: sessionAggregationEngine (every 10 min) → intraday_1m with session + data_quality_score
fallbackDataEngine (every 15 min, +3 min delay) → Finnhub fill for symbols missing PM candles
premarketIntelligenceEngine (every 10 min, +5 min delay) → premarket_watchlist intelligence columns
premarketWatchlistEngine (every 10 min) → score with Phase 9 intelligence adjustments

phase_9_score_adjustments.cap_rules: unchanged (max 90 default, max 100 under strict conditions)

signal_types.GAP_AND_GO: gap > 5% AND trend = UP AND confidence = HIGH

premarket_valid_rule: gap_confidence != LOW AND premarket_volume > 100000 AND range_percent > 1

ui_changes.research_view: Premarket Intelligence Panel added with Trend / Gap% / Confidence / Signal / Structure% / Volume / Valid metrics + why-tradeable narrative

fallback_engine.overwrite_policy: ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING — never overwrites existing FMP data
fallback_engine.triggers: symbols in premarket_watchlist with no PREMARKET candles in last 24h
